meta.title: Unsolicited Response May 19 Live Show
meta.description: The main topic will be President Biden's new Executive Order on cybersecurity and what it will mean to the ICS community. We probably will talk a bit about Colonial Pipeline, but I'll have "unrelated", "BS" and "reckless speculation" buzzers ready. Guests to be announced, and hoping to get lots of online questions and comments.
